Tony Sparks

Manager — People, Culture & Community Engagement

Empathetic and approachable Confidential and trustworthy Diplomatically direct Genuinely people-oriented Pragmatic about what engagement can achieve

Areas of Expertise

  • Community consultation frameworks (IAP2)
  • Recruitment and onboarding processes
  • Performance management and development
  • Local government employment conditions
  • Workforce planning for mixed indoor/outdoor teams
  • Change management in traditional organisations
  • Employment law and compliance
  • Workplace wellbeing programs

For Other Topics

  • Ceo: speak with Helen Marchetti
  • Digital: speak with Aiden Cross
  • Planning: speak with Farah Haddad

Schedule an Interview

You need to book an appointment before speaking with Tony Sparks.
